SBI Probationary Officer (PO) 2026 — 1,500 Vacancies | Apply Now
items.education: Any Graduate from a recognized University (Final year students may also apply)
items.details:
🔥 Mega Banking Recruitment: State Bank of India has officially released the SBI PO 2026 notification (Advertisement No: CRPD/PO/2026-27/09) for 1,500 Probationary Officer vacancies.

Key Highlights:

  • 1,446 fresh vacancies + 54 backlog vacancies across all categories.
  • Phase-I (Prelims) scheduled for August 2026.
  • Phase-II (Mains) scheduled for September 2026.
  • Phase-III includes Psychometric Test, Group Exercises & Personal Interview in Oct/Nov 2026.

Candidates must complete their One-Time Registration (OTR) on the SBI careers portal before applying.
items.other_details: Age Limit: 21-30 years as on 01-04-2026. Upper age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC. Selection through 3-phase process: Preliminary Exam (100 marks, 1 hour), Main Exam (225 marks, 3 hours), and Interview/GD.

items.title: Coal India Limited (CIL) Management Trainee 2026 — 660 Vacancies | Last Day Tomorrow!
items.education: B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc (Engg) in relevant discipline OR CA/ICWA/MBA/Post Graduate Degree
items.details:
⚠️ Closing Tomorrow! Coal India Limited invites applications for 660 Management Trainee positions across multiple disciplines (Advt No. 03/2026).

Available Disciplines:

  • Civil, Electrical, Mechanical, Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering
  • System (IT/CS), Geology, Industrial Engineering
  • Rajbhasha (Hindi), Company Secretary

Important: Application deadline extended to June 21, 2026 (6:00 PM). Do not wait until the last minute.
items.other_details: Age Limit: 30 years as on 01-06-2026 (relaxation as per rules). Selection through GATE 2025/2026 score for technical disciplines OR Computer Based Test for non-technical disciplines, followed by Document Verification and Medical Examination.

items.title: Indian Navy 10+2 B.Tech Cadet Entry Scheme 2026 — 60 Posts | Apply Before Jun 29
items.salary: Rs. 56,100/- per month (Level-10 on joining as Sub-Lieutenant)
items.application_fee: Nil (No application fee for any category)
items.education: 10+2 with 70% aggregate in PCM + JEE Main 2026 qualified
items.details:
🚢 Prestigious Defence Career: Indian Navy invites applications from unmarried male and female candidates for the 10+2 (B.Tech) Cadet Entry Scheme for Jan 2027 course.

Branch-wise Vacancies:

  • Mechanical Engineering: 30 Posts
  • Electronics & Communication Engineering: 30 Posts
  • Maximum 08 vacancies reserved for women (04 each branch)

Selected candidates undergo a 4-year B.Tech degree at the Indian Naval Academy (INA), Ezhimala with degree awarded by Jawaharlal Nehru University (JNU). This is a Permanent Commission opportunity.
items.other_details: Age: Born between 02-07-2007 and 01-01-2010. Must have appeared for JEE (Main) 2026. Shortlisting based on JEE Main All India Common Rank List (CRL). SSB Interview at designated centres. Minimum 50% marks in English in 10th or 12th.

items.title: APSC CCE 2026 — 78 Posts (ACS/APS & Allied Services) | Admit Card Out, Prelims Jul 5
items.salary: Rs. 30,000 - 1,10,000/- (as per 7th Pay Commission, varies by post)
items.application_fee: General: Rs. 297.20, SC/ST/OBC/MOBC: Rs. 197.20, BPL: Rs. 47.20
items.education: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University
items.details:
🎯 Top Assam Exam Alert: Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) has released admit cards for the CCE 2026 Preliminary Examination.

Key Posts Include:

  • Assam Civil Service (ACS)
  • Assam Police Service (APS)
  • Assam Land & Revenue Service
  • Labour Inspector, Inspector of Taxes, and other allied services

Admit Cards released on June 15, 2026 — Download from the official APSC website immediately. Prelims exam on July 5, 2026.
items.other_details: Age Limit: 21 to 38 years as on 01-01-2026. Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC/MOBC. Must be a permanent resident of Assam and registered with a District Employment Exchange in Assam. Prelims consist of 2 papers of General Studies (200 marks each).

items.title: Oil India Limited (OIL) Recruitment 2026 — 70 Junior Engineer & Assistant Posts
items.education: 10th + ITI Trade Certificate OR 10+2 with Computer Diploma OR Diploma in Engineering
items.details:
Premium Local PSU Opening: Oil India Limited invites applications from eligible candidates for multiple regular positions at its operational areas in Assam.

Key Positions:

  • Junior Office Assistant (33 Posts): Requires 10+2 and 6-month Computer Certificate.
  • Junior Technician (Fitter/Instrument Mechanic/Surveyor): Requires Class 10 + ITI.
  • Junior Engineer Electrical (4 Posts): Requires 3-Year Diploma + Assam Electrical Supervisor Certificate.
items.other_details: Age Limit: 18 to 40 years as of the closing date. Selection relies on a 2-hour and 40-minute Computer-Based Test (CBT) with zero negative marking. Minimum qualifying threshold is 40 marks.

items.title: SBI Junior Associates (Clerk) 2026 — 8,000+ Vacancies | Notification Out
items.other_details: Age Limit 20-28. Preliminary, Main exams and Local Language Test.

items.title: SSC CHSL 2026 — Notification Expected This Month | 3,000–4,000+ Vacancies
items.details:
📢 Coming Soon: The SSC CHSL 2026 notification was originally scheduled for April 30 but has been delayed. It is now expected to release in June 2026.

  • Posts: Lower Division Clerk (LDC), Junior Secretariat Assistant (JSA), Data Entry Operator (DEO)
  • Tier-I Exam tentatively scheduled between July–September 2026
  • Candidates should complete their SSC One-Time Registration (OTR) in advance
items.other_details: Age Limit: 18-27 years (relaxation as per rules). Computer Based Exam (Tier 1 & Tier 2). Minimum 12th pass from a recognized board.

items.title: IBPS PO (CRP PO/MT-XVI) 2026 — Expected 5,000+ Vacancies | Notification Expected Soon
items.education: Any Graduate from a recognized University
items.details:
📢 Upcoming Major Banking Exam: IBPS PO 2026 notification is expected to be released in June/July 2026 as per the official IBPS calendar.

  • Preliminary Exam: 22nd & 23rd August 2026
  • Main Exam: 4th October 2026
  • Vacancies expected in the range of 5,000+ across participating banks
  • Keep checking ibps.in for the official notification
items.other_details: Age Limit: 20-30 years. Selection through Prelims, Mains & Interview. Participating banks include PNB, BOB, Canara Bank, Union Bank and other nationalized banks.

items.title: APSC Chemist & Drilling Engineer 2026 — 03 Posts | Application Opens Jun 24
items.details:
📢 Assam PSC New Recruitment: APSC has announced recruitment under the Directorate of Geology and Mining, Assam.

  • Chemist (02 Posts): Online applications from June 18 to July 17, 2026
  • Drilling Engineer (01 Post): Online applications from June 24 to July 23, 2026
  • Must be permanent resident of Assam
  • Apply through the official APSC portal
items.other_details: Age Limit: 21-38 years as on 01-01-2026. Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC/MOBC. Candidates must be registered with a District Employment Exchange in Assam.
